title: SpaceX says it can buy AI coding tool Cursor for $60B later this year
description: SpaceX says it has the rights to buy artificial intelligence coding tool Cursor for $60 billion later this year as Elon Musk’s space exploration and AI company looks for ways to compete with rivals Anthropic and OpenAI ahead of a planned Wall Street debut.

title: Microsoft to integrate Anthropic's Mythos into its security development program
description: Microsoft said on Wednesday it plans to embed advanced artificial intelligence models, including Anthropic's Claude Mythos ​Preview, into its secure coding framework, as ‌the company steps up its cybersecurity capabilities.
content:

title: Rivian CEO Sees New Electric SUV as Key Milestone for AI Tech
description: Rivian Automotive Inc. is betting its next-generation R2 SUV will do more than boost sales. The higher-volume vehicle is key to unlocking the EV maker’s autonomous driving future, Chief Executive Officer RJ Scaringe said, by scaling the real-world data needed for its artificial-intelligence technology.

description: A Mark Zuckerberg-backed private school in the Bay Area is laying off nearly 150 employees as it prepares to shut down this summer — as the tech scion invests billions into artificial intelligence.
